prompt: A candid smartphone photo of a young East Asian woman sitting at a small table inside a casual Taiwanese breakfast shop, medium shot in vertical 9:16 composition. She has shoulder-length straight dark brown to black hair with a side part and is wearing a fitted ribbed camisole in light gray, high-waisted light blue denim shorts, and a loose sheer white cardigan slipping off both shoulders. She is seated on a black chair and holding a foil-wrapped breakfast rice roll or sandwich with both hands close to her mouth as if about to take a bite. Her body is angled slightly to the right, with a relaxed, natural pose and a soft lifestyle-photo aesthetic. Place a large rectangular blur censor block over her face, centered and covering the entire face area. On the table in the lower left foreground, include 1 large takeaway cup with a plastic lid and 1 red straw. In the background, show the open storefront interior of a traditional breakfast stall with stainless steel counters, a glass warming display, condiment bottles, 1 worker behind the counter, 1 wall fan, and overhead menu boards with red and blue Chinese characters and prices. Also include a glass door on the left with Chinese signage and hours posted. Lighting should be natural daylight, slightly soft, with realistic skin tones, casual street-photo realism, shallow depth but still readable background details, authentic urban Taiwan eatery atmosphere.
